title: Calamus binnendijkii

The plant is also known as the Borneo dragon's blood palm due to its red sap, which has been used for medicinal and dyeing purposes. Calamus binnendijkii is closely related to other species of Calamus, which are also characterized by their distinctive palmate leaves and stately growth habit. The plant's classification as Calamus binnendijkii is recognized in various botanical and horticultural resources.
